purpose: Route design-oriented requests to the narrowest design child across broad visual-system guidance, reusable token-spec generation, model-generated browser UI, and experimental liquid-glass effects.
selection_order: Explicit liquid-glass, refraction, or displacement-map work beats every other design route because it is a narrow experimental browser technique rather than general visual polish.
Model-generated browser UI beats token work when the hard problem is schema-driven, streamed, sandboxed, or agent-rendered interface generation.
Reusable token-spec or brand-system deliverables beat broad visual guidance when the main output is a portable design token spec, brand system, or design architecture artifact.
Default to design foundations when the request is broad guidance for color, typography, spacing, charts, or general art direction and no project-specific token system already governs the work.

children.name: liquid-glass-design
children.summary: Handles explicit Apple-like liquid glass browser effects using CSS/SVG refraction, displacement maps, and backdrop-filter prototypes.
route_when: The request explicitly asks for liquid glass, refraction, displacement maps, backdrop-filter optics, or Apple-like glass UI in the browser.
The main deliverable is an experimental Chromium or Electron glass-effect prototype rather than general visual-system guidance.
avoid_when: The request is only for generic visual polish, broad design guidance, or a reusable token system with no explicit glass-effect work.
The real job is building a normal website or webapp rather than researching or implementing a narrow glass-specific effect.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover shared design leaves automatically.

children.name: generative-ui
children.summary: Handles model-generated interactive browser UI such as schema-driven renderers, streamed UI, sandboxed HTML, and agent-rendered components.
route_when: The hard problem is model-generated or agent-rendered UI in the browser, including schema-driven rendering, streamed UI, or sandboxed HTML experiences.
The user needs renderer boundaries, output contracts, or safe adaptive interface generation rather than a normal hand-authored web surface.
avoid_when: The request is for a normal website, dashboard, or product interface with hand-authored UI rather than a generative rendering layer.
The main deliverable is a reusable token spec or an explicit liquid-glass experiment rather than the generative UI runtime itself.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover shared design leaves automatically.

children.name: generating-design-tokens
children.summary: Handles reusable design-token specs, brand systems, and design-spec artifacts synthesized from brand inputs or existing product documentation.
route_when: The main deliverable is a portable design token spec, brand system, or design architecture document rather than one-off visual guidance.
The task is to reconcile brand inputs, product docs, or visual references into explicit token definitions with traceable rationale.
avoid_when: The request only needs broad visual guidance for colors, typography, spacing, or charts without producing a reusable token artifact.
The hard problem is model-generated browser UI or an explicit glass-effect prototype rather than token-spec generation.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover shared design leaves automatically.

children.name: design-foundations
children.summary: Handles broad visual-system guidance such as color, typography, spacing, chart styling, and artifact-level art direction when no project token system already governs the work.
route_when: The request is for broad design guidance across colors, typography, spacing, chart styling, or general visual polish and there is no project-specific token system already governing the work.
The user needs design decisions for a visual artifact but is not asking for a reusable token spec, generative UI runtime, or explicit liquid-glass effect.
avoid_when: The main deliverable is a reusable token spec, brand system, model-generated browser UI layer, or explicit glass-effect prototype.
The real job is ordinary website or product implementation rather than design-boundary guidance itself.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover shared design leaves automatically.
